name: ask_circuitry_ai_advisor
description: Ask a question to Circuitry AI advisor about equipment maintenance and manuals. The system will initialize a conversation session and then submit your question.

parameters.name: user_question
parameters.description: The user's question about equipment, manuals, or maintenance procedures
examples: How do I fill the liquid reservoir for the DS-40i?
What is the maintenance schedule for the printer?
what are the claim approval limits?

pre_requests.name: initialize_session
pre_requests.description: Initialize conversation session with Circuitry AI to get sender_id

api_config.error_message: I couldn't retrieve the information from the knowledge base right now. Please try again.

engaging_words: Let me search the equipment manual for you...
